title: Dry Crunchy Jamaican Coconut Skewers
description: A light and crunchy Jamaican dish featuring desiccated coconut, this recipe is Whole30-friendly and perfect for a snack. The bitter flavor is balanced by the sweetness of the coconut.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Soak the bamboo skewers in water for 30 minutes.
Mix the desiccated coconut, coconut oil, lime juice, salt, black pepper, and scotch bonnet pepper in a bowl.
Thread a small amount of the coconut mixture onto each bamboo skewer.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the skewers in the preheated oven for 15 minutes, flipping them halfway through.
Remove the skewers from the oven and let them cool completely.
Sprinkle the chopped cilantro over the skewers and serve.
